mapper.update: INSERT INTO customer_material_stats (customer_id, material_code, recent_3m_quantity, avg_unit_price, stats_updated_at) SELECT customer_id, material_code, SUM(quantity) as recent_3m_quantity, AVG(unit_price) as avg_unit_price, NOW() as stats_updated_at FROM sales_order_item WHERE order_id IN ( SELECT id FROM sales_order WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AND status IN ('completed', 'shipped') ) GROUP BY customer_id, material_code ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE recent_3m_quantity = VALUES(recent_3m_quantity), avg_unit_price = VALUES(avg_unit_price), stats_updated_at = VALUES(stats_updated_at);
